title: Songful's Epic Fight Datapack
description: This is an addon to my mods, allowing them to work with Epic Fight
body:
This is an addon for my mods, allowing them to be compatiable with Epic Fight. Make sure to put it in your data pack and resource pack folder for it to work.

Feel free to make a video on this datapack
Made with Epic Fight's datapack creator. Uses built-in animations from Epic Fight
